headline: AI moved FAST this week: GPT-5.4 drops, Claude gets 1M context, Gemini 3.1 dominating benchmarks, Meta's MTIA chips coming, and lowkey everyone's in an arms race

stories.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4 Released with 1M Token Context & 33% Fewer Errors
stories.summary: GPT-5.4 just shipped with a massive 1-million-token context window and delivers 33% fewer factual errors vs GPT-5.2. API pricing is dirt cheap at $2.50/M input tokens.
stories.takeaway: This is lowkey the biggest move yet—frontier model performance at prices that won't break your budget. Perfect storm.

stories.title: Claude Opus 4.6 Unlocks 1M Context for All Tiers, Ups the Game
stories.summary: Anthropic pushed out Claude Opus 4.6 on Feb 5 with 1M token context on Max/Team/Enterprise, plus partner program committing $100M for ecosystem support. Multi-agent 'Dev Team' mode coming soon.
stories.takeaway: Tbh Anthropic's playing the long game—betting on partners + massive context = winning enterprise over.

stories.title: Google Gemini 3.1 Drops, Dominates 13 of 16 Major Benchmarks
stories.summary: Gemini 3.1 Pro arrived with 1M-token context window, crushing benchmarks on multimodal reasoning. Flash-Lite variant also dropped at just $0.25/M input tokens for cost-conscious builders.
stories.takeaway: Literally Google's saying 'we built the best, and it's cheaper than everything.' Frontier performance hitting commodity pricing.

stories.title: Meta MTIA Chip Strategy: 4 New Generations by End of 2027
stories.summary: Meta announced MTIA 300, 400, 450, 500 chips rolling out through 2027 to cut AI costs & reduce Nvidia reliance. Part of the massive AI infrastructure pivot away from metaverse.
stories.takeaway: Meta's betting billions on custom silicon to power agentic AI at scale. This is the infrastructure arms race heating up.

watchNext.title: OpenAI Raises $110B, Hits $730B Valuation—IPO Coming 2026?
watchNext.why: Insane funding round signals AI war is real. Watch for public markets reaction to frontier model pricing power.

watchNext.title: Papers with Code Shutdown (2025) Leaves Benchmark Infrastructure Gap
watchNext.why: Meta killed Papers with Code last year; now Hugging Face is filling the void but missing SOTA leaderboards. Critical for staying updated on actual model performance.
